scripts.build:github: node -e "process.env.GITHUB_PAGES='1'; const cp=require('child_process'); const b=cp.spawnSync('next',['build'],{stdio:'inherit',shell:true}); if(b.status) process.exit(b.status); const s=cp.spawnSync('node',['scripts/sync-pages.mjs'],{stdio:'inherit',shell:true}); process.exit(s.status||0)"
